author: ShadyTidus
Vertyco
description: Full-featured leveling system (fork of LevelUp with modern pydantic support)
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord IDs, counts of user messages, and their time spent in voice channels. No private info is stored about users.
install_msg:
Thank you for installing ShadyLevel!

IMPORTANT: If you get a 'Sentinel' import error, run this in your Red venv:
  pip install 'typing_extensions>=4.12'

To enable leveling: `[p]lset toggle`
